## onecxt-hard-rules

> Hard rules (top-priority)


<!-- GENERATED by onecxt adapt — DO NOT EDIT. Changes will be overwritten. Edit the source in meta/ or knowledge/ instead. -->

Respond in ≤2 lines maximum. No pleasantries. No restating user input. Lead with the answer.
